reviews.review_description:
The artstyle and vibe of this game genuinely looks great. I love the models, the sounds, the animations- it's all really fun, silly and made with love.

That being said, the gameplay... wasn't very fun.
The Jumping system is really weird- you have to press the Grip button, and *maybe* you'll jump. Your player character resets appearance upon changing lobbies, and the whole remote character customisation thing is badly bugged.

And I had absolutely no idea where I was going, what I was supposed to be doing, and wasn't having fun.
I joined the game for the Murder Mystery thing, which looked great. Unfortunately, there was no real explanation on where it was, or how to play the games at all. I found myself just wandering around a world clearly designed for someone who had mastered the movement, lost, confused and annoyed.

I'm not saying the game should hold my hand the entire time. But sheesh, it'd be nice if the way forward made any sort of sense. 

Two stars for the artstyle and graphic work, the gameplay is *probably* good, but first impressions did not impress.

developer_response.body: thanks that is a fair criticism, we will work on the onboarding.  Right now we are putting players into the most populated session so they get with other people but there's not so much explanation.  Think we might make a more "starter" world we put people in before the advanced modes.

reviews.review_description:
I honestly don’t understand why this game has such a low rating. I have been playing this game for about a week now, and there really isn’t much negative I could say about this game. The mechanics are amazing, it seems that to a lot of people it takes a second to learn, but once you start going fast and hitting crazy lines, this game is so much fun. 

Also, I didn’t expect the pvp aspect of this game, with plenty of different items you can use, plus just the free, basic launchers, the pvp in this game is something you don’t find often in free games this early into release.

reviews.review_title: Its a good game if you gave it a chance
reviews.review_description: The game may seem boring at first but when you learn how to play and try out the new weapons and understand how to grind and get new stuff jt gets really fun and the race mode always is addictive trying to get first place before leaving

I’m pretty new to the game but I have been playing for 1 week and so far the game mechanics are good. The graphics are good and the player models are good and the community isn’t toxic like gorilla tag.
Great game to play with friends
Honestly a very good game! It is a lot of fun to play with friends. It has some bugs, but it just came out, so that is expected
Honestly, I’m glad to have seen this game so early on in the development. This games gonna be big one day.
This game just got released to the public I played it in the beta I think!
